title: hieracium villosum subsp. villosum
intro: Hieracium villosum subsp. villosum, also known as woolly hawkweed, is a plant species in the dandelion family that is commonly found in meadows and rocky areas. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be beneficial for treating wounds, skin issues, and infections. The health benefits of Hieracium villosum subsp. villosum include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and support the immune system, making it a valuable herbal remedy for various health conditions. Hieracium villosum subsp. villosum can be prepared for medicinal use through infusions, tinctures, and salves, allowing for its active compounds to be extracted and utilized for therapeutic purposes.
